risk_summary: Political and governance risk rating has escalated from Substantial to High, indicating worsening conditions affecting project implementation in Afghanistan.
Macroeconomic risk rating has escalated from Substantial to High, creating challenging conditions for project execution and community support activities.

risk_title: Mobility and Security Constraints on Project Activities
risk_summary: Project management and monitoring activities are being constrained by security challenges that limit staff mobility and field operations in the project area.
evidence_quote: Project management activities under Component 3 (Project Implementation Support and Third Party Monitoring) and Component 4 (Communications and Outreach) were broadly implemented as planned despite facing some mobility and security challenges during the reporting period.
